chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1313 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5452/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.10.2025 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner Miss. Shabana Naheed Assistant Prosecutor General Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with ASI Javed Ali IO PS A Section Sukkur and SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto, on behalf of SSP Sukkur ************** Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate, undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of the private respondent. Accordingly, he may file the same in the office. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that after thorough investigation, the police recommended that the case be disposed of under “C” class, and on such summary, the learned Magistrate ordered for reinvestigation. In view of the above, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner intends to avail an alternate remedy and, as such, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed along with the pending application(s). However, the petitioner shall be at liberty to avail any alternate remedy available under the law, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
